entries.title: Set goals and track your gaming progress
entries.body: You can now set personal gaming goals — complete N games, log X hours, stay under a spending limit, or try new genres. The app watches your library in real time and fills in your progress automatically. Smart suggestions based on your gaming patterns mean your first goal is just one tap away. A compact goals strip above the tabs keeps your targets visible no matter which section you're in.

entries.title: Search your library instantly
entries.body: A search bar now lives at the top of the Games tab. Type a game name, genre, or platform and your list narrows in real time. Works great when you have a big library and just want to find that one game quickly.

entries.title: Updates live here now
entries.body: This is the new What's New panel. When the app changes, you'll see a friendly summary here so you always know what's different.
